hero.description: Beyond Code Collective keeps the human in the loop — providing real-world resources for a tech-driven world. Building intergenerational equity in the technologies of today and tomorrow.

about.description: Beyond Code Collective bridges the gap between inspiration, training, and employment in tech, connecting learners to educational content, opportunities to develop cutting-edge technologies, and avenues to launch careers.

intergenerationalEquity.title: Intergenerational Equity
intergenerationalEquity.description: An ecosystem where all generations participate; not a pipeline that serves one age group, but a model that meets learners wherever they are in life.

allTechnologies.title: All Technologies
allTechnologies.description: From digital fluency and data literacy to automation, cybersecurity, and responsible AI, we prepare learners for the full range of tools they'll encounter.

todayAndTomorrow.title: Today & Tomorrow
todayAndTomorrow.description: Programming that keeps communities relevant now and ready for what's next, as the workforce changes in real time.

forTheFuture.title: For The Future
forTheFuture.description: Building skills and knowledge to develop interests and inform future life decisions.
forTheFuture.quote: I want to learn a new skill and build a career path in a field or industry that helps me prepare for the future.

understandingOurWorld.title: Understanding Our World
understandingOurWorld.description: Improving knowledge to make sense of an ever-changing world.
understandingOurWorld.quote: I want to be informed so I can better understand how technology will impact me and the ones I care about.

changingDirection.title: Changing Direction
changingDirection.description: Learning specific skills to change or upgrade careers, or improve prospects.
changingDirection.quote: I want to learn the skills that are most desired by employers so I can develop a clear pathway into an evolved or new technology role.

makingADifference.title: Making A Difference
makingADifference.description: Contributing to a better future via funds, partnerships, or otherwise.
makingADifference.quote: I want to help fuel the next generation of technologists by offering the resources I or my organization have at our disposal.

items.label: Of Employers Intend to Upskill Teams for Emerging Tech
Initiatives Building Pathways to Quality Careers
Ages and Backgrounds Welcome — From K-12 to Career Changers
Of Organizations Report a Critical AI & Data Literacy Gap

initiatives.description: Beyond Code Collective is an integrated ecosystem creating sustainable pathways to quality jobs while strengthening the digital capacity of mission-driven organizations.

forge.title: The Forge
forge.description: Place-based hubs blending tech education, workforce development, and community engagement for learners of all ages — from K-12 to adults looking to upskill or pivot into tech careers.

catalysts.title: Beyond Code Catalysts
catalysts.description: Career pathways for 18+ learners combining accessible training, hands-on projects, and career readiness support. No traditional tech background required.

codeAlong.title: Code Along
codeAlong.description: A free video coding academy with step-by-step tutorials, making tech education accessible to everyone through digital how-to learning.

afterTheGame.title: After The Game
afterTheGame.description: A national, cohort-based workforce program for transitioning or recently retired professional and NCAA student-athletes. Bridges the digital skill divide with technical leads teaching live classes, plus wraparound support from corporate readiness to job placement.

items.quote: Before Beyond Code Collective, I thought tech was out of reach for me. I was working in healthcare doing medical billing and coding, but I realized it wasn't what I wanted long-term. This program gave me the opportunity to refocus and pursue the technology path I always wanted.
items.name: Londella

items.quote: Before Beyond Code Collective, I thought tech was impossible to get my hands on. Now tech is at my fingertips. The birth of my son pushed me to take tech more seriously and just go for it. I wanted to provide for my family and dive into an interest I already had.
items.name: Josh

founder.label: Meet The Founder
founder.title: Founder & CEO
founder.bio: Cristina Mancini is the visionary Founder & CEO of Beyond Code Collective (BCC), a new national ecosystem built to close the AI literacy gap and unlock digital dignity for communities long excluded from the future of work. She created BCC to answer a transformative question: What if every community had permanent, culturally grounded access to the skills and pathways that define the next decade of innovation and the future of work?
founder.quote: "AI doesn't eliminate the need for technical literacy; it makes it more essential. At BCC we're teaching our learners how to supervise it, secure it, and build with it. You cannot supervise what you do not understand. This is why foundational knowledge is critical."

resources.description: Everything you need to understand our mission, share with your network, or bring Beyond Code to your community.

onePager.title: Beyond Code Collective One-Pager
onePager.description: An overview of Beyond Code Collective — mission, initiatives, and how to get involved.

forgeOverview.title: The Forge Overview
forgeOverview.description: Details on our place-based tech hubs blending education, workforce development, and community engagement.

brandFlipbook.title: Brand Flipbook
brandFlipbook.description: Our visual identity, brand story, and the design language behind Beyond Code Collective.

ctaBridge.label: [ PARTNERSHIPS ]
ctaBridge.description: We partner with industry leaders to create pathways into tech. Together, we're building a workforce that reflects the world it serves.
ctaBridge.logoLabel: Where Tech Careers Are Being Built
